title: Nihun Valley
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Nihun Valley''' was a valley on [[Brosi]], to the east of [[Nihun River]].<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

Nihun Valley was in the influence area of the [[Brosin Underground]] around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]. The largest team of the Brosin Underground, personally led by [[Vuraj Marn]], operated both in [[Reyno Valley]] and Nihun Valley.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
